page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Swine Disease Reporting System (SDRS) consists of multiple projects that aggregates data from participating veterinary diagnostic laboratories (VDLs) in the United States of America, and reports the major findings to the swine industry.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Swine Disease Reporting System (SDRS) consists of multiple projects that aggregates data from participating veterinary diagnostic laboratories (VDLs) in the United States of America, and reports the major findings to the swine industry.
